description: auto-configuring VISTA3D continual finetune of NV-Segment-CT on a CT NIfTI dataset (smoke/sanity/dataset)
rules: destructive: trains/finetunes a model and writes checkpoints
thin wrapper around the upstream MONAI bundle run; do not replace it with handwritten training
do not patch files under bundle/ or upstream checkouts during normal use
monai==1.4.0 is required (1.5.x can crash the upstream finetune loss on boolean labels)
smoke proves wiring only (spleen_micro fixture); it is not a quality bar
writes output.json (schema-checked) plus checkpoints + generated configs under the output dir / bundle/configs
usage: Set DATASET (dataset/fixture dir) and optional FINETUNE_ARGS (extra CLI flags). A 'spleen_micro' dir auto-selects --smoke, a 'Task06_Lung' dir auto-selects --sanity, any other MSD-layout dir (imagesTr/ + labelsTr/) is finetuned. Output dir = RECORD_STORE. Output: output.json.
limitation: Thin wrapper: training, validation, transforms, and checkpointing are delegated to the upstream bundle. The auto-derived plan is heuristic; caller --patch-size/--cache-rate/--epochs/--learning-rate win. The Task06 sanity recipe forces single-GPU; multi-GPU for other datasets needs host torchrun. Not for clinical deployment, interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, or regulatory submission.
